name: Crown Guard
author: Poki
description: Crown Guard puts you in command of a strategic tower defense mission where your objective is clear: protect the crown at all costs! Build powerful towers and deploy units to fend off relentless enemy attacks. Use gold mines to increase your resources and plot the path of your soldiers wisely toward enemy territory. Each victory can bring you some precious gems to upgrade your skills permanently. Can you safeguard the crown against your enemies? How to play Crown Guard? Tap on the empty tiles to build a tower. Draw a path for your soldiers to attack the enemy castle. Who created Crown Guard? Crown Guard is created by Iriysoft. Play their other dirtbike games on Poki: Moto Maniac , Moto Maniac 2 and Rush Race Motocross ! How can I play Crown Guard for free? You can play Crown Guard for free on Poki. Can I play Crown Guard on mobile devices and desktop? Crown Guard can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
